title: Board the Ship
signIn: Sign in to enter the Captain's Quarters
forgotPassword: Arrr, I've forgotten me Secret Countersign
forgotPasswordInstructions: Enter the Message Bottle Address ye use to board yer ship's ledger
forgotPasswordSendEmail: We'll send ye a message in a bottle with instructions to choose a new Secret Countersign.
twoFactorTitle: Enter Yer Double-Verification Seal Code, Matey!
twoFactorInstructions: Use yer configured authenticator to get a code and enter it here, landlubber.
emailVerificationInstructions: Enter the security code sent to yer message bottle address.
noAccountYet: Not yet part of the crew?
welcomeBack: Welcome back to our growing Crew of Pirates
pleaseEnterEmail: Please enter a Message Bottle Address
pleaseEnterValidEmail: Please enter a valid Message Bottle Address
pleaseEnterGiftcard: Please enter a treasure voucher number
invalidCode: Invalid code, ye scallywag! Enter the correct code.
registrationSuccessful: Ye've joined the crew! Welcome aboard!

oauth.twoFactorPrompt: The Double-Verification Seal is active on this account. Enter yer authenticator code to finish boarding.

oauth.verifyEmailSent: A verification code has been dispatched to yer message bottle.
oauth.enterEmailAndPassword: Please enter Message Bottle Address and Secret Countersign
